disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases remain at 13, no new deaths reported in over month: WHO chief - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases remain at 13, no new deaths reported in over month: WHO chief Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称汉坦病毒病例仍为13例，月余无新增死亡。

updates.title_en: Scientists retrace steps of Dutch tourists as Argentina expands hantavirus probe - The Independent
updates.body_en: Scientists retrace steps of Dutch tourists as Argentina expands hantavirus probe The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查，追踪荷兰游客行程。

updates.title_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe; sends teams to test rats in Mendoza - The Hindu
updates.body_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe; sends teams to test rats in Mendoza The Hindu
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查，派团队检测门多萨老鼠。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Argentina expands probe to trace outbreak source - DW.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Argentina expands probe to trace outbreak source DW.com
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查以追踪疫情源头。

updates.title_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza - Toronto Star
updates.body_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza Toronto Star
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查，派队到门多萨捕鼠检测。

updates.title_en: Argentina to expand hantavirus search to a second province - CP24
updates.body_en: Argentina to expand hantavirus search to a second province CP24
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷将汉坦病毒搜索扩大至第二个省份。

updates.title_en: New Tool Quickly Sequences Hantavirus Genome - American Society for Microbiology
updates.body_en: New Tool Quickly Sequences Hantavirus Genome American Society for Microbiology
updates.summary_zh: 新工具可快速测序汉坦病毒基因组。

updates.title_en: Doctor who said he treated patients with Hantavirus on cruise ship returns home - KTVB
updates.body_en: Doctor who said he treated patients with Hantavirus on cruise ship returns home KTVB
updates.summary_zh: 自称在邮轮上治疗汉坦病毒患者的医生返回家中。

updates.title_en: I Was on the Deadly Hantavirus Cruise. Now I'm One of 18 People in Quarantine. - Outside Magazine
updates.body_en: I Was on the Deadly Hantavirus Cruise. Now I'm One of 18 People in Quarantine. Outside Magazine
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮幸存者自述，18人隔离中。

updates.title_en: Bend Doctor Who Took Charge During Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak Finally Returns Home - KTVZ
updates.body_en: Bend Doctor Who Took Charge During Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak Finally Returns Home KTVZ
updates.summary_zh: 在致命汉坦病毒爆发中负责的本德医生终于回家。

updates.title_en: Immunotherapy Shows Early Promise Against Severe Hantavirus Lung Disease: Study - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Immunotherapy Shows Early Promise Against Severe Hantavirus Lung Disease: Study Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: 研究显示免疫疗法对重症汉坦病毒肺病早期有效。

updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in focus III: reflections from the IHR Border Health and Points of Entry perspective World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒边境卫生网络研讨会。

updates.summary_zh: 美联社报道汉坦病毒防治工具前景可期但资金有限。

updates.summary_zh: 俄勒冈州医生结束邮轮隔离后返家继续隔离。
